Concept: Unusable Battery Components

Creator

Description

These components are unusable either because they are damaged or because they have no use in the repurposed battery.

Usage List:

  • Appears as Unusable Battery Components in Diagram Repair Battery in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Unusable Battery Components in Diagram A312: Repurpose Battery in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Unusable Battery Components in Diagram A313: Send for New Application in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Unusable Battery Components in Diagram Repurpose in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Unusable Battery Components in Diagram Recover Materials/Devices in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
